questionBank.title: Question Bank
questionBank.subtitle: Browse active interview probes by role, level, skill, language, and usage signal.
questionBank.emptyBody: Adjust the filters or clear the search keyword to see more active probes.

card.detailPending: Detail and single-question practice arrive in the next feature.

detail.question: Question
detail.intent: What the interviewer is looking for
detail.practiceSubtitle: Submit once you are ready for AI feedback.
detail.answerPlaceholder: Write your answer here. A STAR-style answer works well for behavioral questions.
detail.voicePlaceholder: Choose voice mode, start the mic, then speak your answer. The transcript will appear here.
detail.voiceReadyBody: Voice input uses your browser speech recognition and submits the transcript as your answer.
detail.voiceUnsupportedBody: This browser does not support speech recognition. You can still submit a text answer.
detail.voiceListeningBody: Listening now. Pause for a moment or press Stop when you finish speaking.
detail.submittedBody: Feedback is pending. You can start a new attempt when you want to answer again.

feedback.title: Probe-aware feedback
feedback.subtitle: Evidence-based scoring for this practice attempt.
feedback.processing: Feedback is being prepared. This page will update automatically.
feedback.failed: Feedback processing failed. You can retry scoring on the same answer.

creditGate.insufficientBody: You need {{required}} Credits to start this session. You have {{current}} Credits. Missing {{deficit}} Credits.
creditGate.lowBalanceWarning: You have {{balance}} Credits left. Top up to avoid interruption next session.
creditGate.zeroBalanceWarning: You have no Credits left after this session. Top up to continue.

hero.subtitle: Realistic simulation environment, integrated JavaScript IDE, and in-depth skill analysis dashboard — all in one platform.

features.sectionSubtitle: Three core pillars to help you practice comprehensively and confidently step into interviews.

interview.title: Realistic Interview Simulation
interview.description: Curated questions from technical interviews at FAANG and leading tech companies, continuously updated.

ide.title: Integrated JavaScript IDE
ide.description: Write and run code directly in the browser with syntax highlighting, auto-indent, and instant output feedback.

analytics.title: In-Depth Skills Analysis Dashboard
analytics.description: Radar chart visualizes strengths and weaknesses by topic: DSA, System Design, OOP — helping you focus on what matters.

howItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Follow three simple steps to start your journey to interview success.

step1.title: Choose Your Topic
step1.description: Select the area you want to practice: Data Structures & Algorithms, System Design, OOP, or Backend Development.

step2.title: Practice in Real Environment
step2.description: Answer interview questions in a simulated environment with integrated code editor and timer.

step3.title: Analyze & Improve
step3.description: Review your results on the dashboard, identify weaknesses, and continue practicing to improve.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of developers who have successfully passed interviews at leading tech companies.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.errorAccountLinked: This GitHub account is already linked to another user.

skillBreakdown.title: Skill Breakdown
skillBreakdown.subtitle: Radar chart showing your proficiency across different areas

learningPath.title: Recommended Learning Path
learningPath.subtitle: Personalized recommendations based on your performance

exitModal.title: Leave interview session?
exitModal.description: The current session will be cancelled and
exitModal.descriptionSuffix: . Your current progress will be lost.

page.title: Start interview
page.description: Confirm CV/JD context, choose a mode, configure rounds, and run Combat device checks inside the dashboard.

preflightError.title: Unable to run preflight
preflightError.fallback: The system could not load your CV/JD context yet. Please try again in a few seconds.

missingContext.title: Interview context missing
missingContext.body: You have not uploaded {{missing}}. Complete your profile so the AI can personalize the interview for your level and target role.

context.title: Confirm CV and JD
context.description: Review the parsed CV/JD before choosing mode and rounds. You can make quick edits here or upload again in Skill Passport.
context.emptyExperience: No experience was parsed from the CV.
context.note: This information will personalize the questions and difficulty of the interview session.
context.responsibilitiesPlaceholder:
Build frontend features
Review code and mentor teammates...

config.modeDescription: Practice is selected by default. Combat checks webcam and microphone in a separate step.
config.roundDescription: Select one or more rounds. Each selected round opens its own configuration below.

practice.title: Practice
practice.description: The AI acts as a mentor, gives hints when needed, and does not require webcam access. Best for learning the interview format.

combat.title: Combat
combat.description: A stricter interview simulation with time limits, webcam, microphone, and a readiness check.
combat.warning: Camera and microphone are requested only after you press Start. Video data is not stored.

behavioral.label: HR & Behavioral (STAR)
behavioral.description: Evaluate culture fit and STAR storytelling across behavioral stages.

dsa.label: DSA & Live Coding
dsa.description: Algorithms, clean code, complexity, and problem solving in a sandbox.

aiPrompting.label: AI Prompting & Pair Programming
aiPrompting.description: Debug code with an internal AI and evaluate prompt engineering thinking.

systemDesign.label: System Design (Whiteboard)
systemDesign.description: Architecture design, trade-offs, and whiteboard flow with an AI interviewer.

behavioralConfig.deepHint: Probe evidence and follow-ups more deeply

dsaConfig.autoPick: Problems will be selected automatically for your level and session configuration.

combat.requestingBody: Allow browser access to webcam and microphone. This step runs inside the dashboard shell.
combat.deniedBody: The browser denied webcam or microphone permission. Enable it in browser settings and retry, or switch to Practice mode.
combat.title: Check camera and microphone
combat.description: Make sure only one face is visible and the window is focused before entering the Combat room.
combat.noFaceWarning: No face detected. Point the camera toward yourself and make sure lighting is sufficient.
combat.multiFaceWarning: {{count}} faces detected. Combat mode requires exactly one person in frame.
combat.checklistReadyBody: All Combat checks passed. The system will open the full-screen Combat room after you start.
combat.checklistNotReadyBody: Keep the tab visible, the window focused, and the browser large enough.

credit.title: Insufficient Credits
credit.body: You need {{required}} Credits to start this session. Current balance: {{current}} Credits. Deficit: {{deficit}} Credits.

interviewRoom.title: Interview Room
interviewRoom.problemDescription: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.
interviewRoom.problemNote: You may assume that each input would have exactly one solution, and you may not use the same element twice.

editor.title: Code
editor.ariaLabel: Code editor — write your solution here

interviewRoom.confirmEnd: End the interview session and return to Dashboard?

sdRoom.canvasLockedMessage: Canvas will unlock after Clarification phase

aiChat.title: AI Interviewer
aiChat.drawingPlaceholder: Draw your architecture, then click Done Drawing...
aiChat.doneDrawingConfirm: Are you sure you're done drawing? You won't be able to edit the canvas after this.
aiChat.hintPenaltyNote: Each hint reduces your final score

CLARIFICATION.goal: Ask enough clarifying questions to scope the problem before you start designing.
checklist: Scope: which features to build and which to exclude
Scale: number of users, QPS, storage volume

DESIGN.goal: Draw a high-level architecture covering the core data flow on the canvas.

DESIGN_DRAWING.goal: Draw a high-level architecture covering the core data flow on the canvas.

DESIGN_WALKTHROUGH.goal: Walk the interviewer through your design end-to-end.
checklist: Explain each component and its role
Trace the main flows (read path, write path)
Connect your design to the requirements you clarified

DEEP_DIVE.goal: Explain your design decisions in depth for each component you drew.
checklist: What happens if a component fails
Alternatives you considered and why you chose this approach

WRAP_UP.goal: Address failure scenarios, scaling limits, and edge cases.
checklist: What happens when a component goes down
How the system handles sudden traffic spikes
Remaining edge cases not yet discussed

evaluation.debriefNote: Full debrief will be available in the next step.
evaluation.error: Evaluation failed. Please refresh and try again.

sdDebrief.suggestionFallback: Unable to generate suggestions at this time

error.init: Unable to start the interview session

chat.pasteWarning: You pasted a long text. Make sure this is your own answer.
chat.charApproaching: Approaching the limit – try to be more concise.
chat.charMin: A STAR-style answer usually needs at least 100 characters.

exitModal.title: Exit interview?
exitModal.description: The session will be cancelled and
exitModal.descriptionSuffix: . Your current answers will be lost.

problem.readInstruction: Read the prompt carefully. When ready, write your approach before coding.
problem.readPlaceholder: Read the prompt, then click Ready.
problem.approachPlaceholder: Write your approach to unlock the editor.

approach.title: Your approach
approach.description: Before coding, outline the algorithm, estimated complexity, and edge cases you noticed.
approach.placeholder: Example: Use two pointers. O(n) time, O(1) space. Edge case: empty array...

ai.empty: The AI interviewer will ask when needed

hints.title: Hints
hints.penaltyWarning: Viewing a hint may affect your score.

overlay.nextBody: Moving to the next problem in {{seconds}}s...

exitModal.title: Exit Live Coding round?
exitModal.description: The current session will be cancelled and unsubmitted coding progress will be lost.
